for_sales.sales_text:
Norfolk Gypsy No. 60 built by Charlie Ward North Norfolk Boatyard in 1994. 2 owners since new, very good condition and regularly updated. Just professionally polished and coppercoat refreshed. Lifting centreplate gives 0.5m minimum draught. Sails very effectively in a seaway. All sail control lines lead back to cockpit, easily sailed single-handed, can sail comfortably with 4 adults in the cockpit. 2 full size saloon berths, cockpit tent, full set boat cushions, additional 2 berths under cockpit tent. Chart table and pivoting cabin table. Oil lamp. New sails, running rigging, coppercoat hull, varnished mast and spars, full electrics, NASA instruments, Hella LED navigation lights, iCom VHF DSC radio, EML log, depth sounder, wind direction indicator. Yanmar 1GM10 inboard diesel engine, top end overhauled by marine engineer, alternator and starter motor professionally refurbished. New prop shaft, cutlass bearing, stuffing box gland seal, etc. New engine battery and separate leisure battery, split charging and voltage monitor. Manual bilge pump. Bramber breakback trailer recently professionally serviced, many new parts, new tyres. Come and have an inspection! Photo pack can be supplied on request.
Presently ashore, regularly sailed at/out of Cardiff, trial sail welcomed, within Cardiff Bay.

boat.full_description: She had a new set of sails in 2019, from R&J Sails, Clevedon.
boat.name: Mora
boat.short_description: Mora is a Norfolk Gypsy built in 1994, hull number 60, without modification.
